name: Biscuits (Using Wheat Quick Mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the milk into the wheat quick mix until just combined, forming a soft dough.
2. Place the dough on a floured board and knead gently to bring it together.
3. Roll out the dough until it is about 1 inch thick.
4. Cut the dough into biscuits using a cutter.
5. Arrange the biscuits on a greased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 400°F for 10-15 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
6. Makes 12 biscuits.
